title: Access Holdings Shareholders Commend Exceptional Performance, Approve N2.05 Final Dividend - FinancialEDGE
description: Shareholders of Access Holdings Plc have commended the board of directors and management for the company's exceptional performance in the 2024 financial year. The commendation was made at the company's 3rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) held in Lagos on Thursday, May 15, 2025. Just as shareholders approved a final dividend of N2.05 per share for
html: Shareholders of Access Holdings Plc have commended the board of directors and management for the company’s exceptional performance in the 2024 financial year.
